resources.string: The school is silent, the lights are failing, and something is waiting inside. Start the investigation when you are ready.
A detective stands in the rain outside the abandoned school. Tap the ground to move toward the front entrance while lightning reveals the building.
Rain slides across the school gates.
The front entrance is within reach.
The front door creaks under your hand. Enter the school.
The front hall swallows the storm behind you. Lockers disappear into the dark, and the dead lights leave the entrance in a cold, uneasy silence.
